today.name: CREOSOTE
today.nextAction: v0.4.38 — SUMMING IRON, Playbook round 3 (user chose via interactive Qs: tier switch + all-3-voices audition + full model + NEAL-presets-only). NEW: IronTx (ThetaDSP.h) — console output-transformer model: flux integrator (distortion rises as freq falls, physically correct), remanence-biased residue with constant+linear terms CANCELLED (2nd-harmonic warmth, exactly flat linear response, no DC), 40ms magnetic memory (program-dependent density), coercivity 'stick' tanh(u)-u/sqrt(1+u^2) (zero linear slope — constant-absolute odd component whose relative size GROWS as level falls = decay tails thicken), 8Hz DC blocker on the injection path (biased rectification pumped -28dB DC without it), plus per-voice HF leakage-resonance 'air' via matched shelf hinged ABOVE Nyquist (24-32k, skirt-only, needs v0.4.36 decramping). MEASURED (RICH @100Hz/-18dBFS/48k): NEVE 1.0% THD 2nd-dominant / API 0.8% 3rd-dominant / TG 0.45% polished; flat to 0.001dB; DC <= -122dB; worst alias -114dB (no ADAA/OS needed — flux is LF-weighted); C++ x-checked vs Python to 1e-7. CONTROLS: IRON tier tile (OFF/SUBTLE/RICH lit-lens cycle, compact 92px, SUMMING header row; title 130->110) + IRON VOICE selector (NEVE/API/TG) on TWEAK>MASTER at +650 (dims while tier OFF). AUDITION BUILD: all 3 voices shipped for A/B; the keeper gets frozen later (voice param may then be removed — sessions saved with a non-default voice during audition would revert to the keeper). FREEZE CONTRACT: no SUMMING bump — SUM_IRON default OFF is a true no-op (new-param clause); IronTx constants frozen from birth (changing them later = SUMMING v4). The 6 NEAL presets get SUM_IRON=1 (SUBTLE, NEVE); the 17 album presets untouched. VERIFY IN ABLETON: 48k, SUMMING ON, IRON SUBTLE->RICH on the mixbus: LF thickens and decay tails gain density with no top-octave loss; cycle NEVE/API/TG in TWEAK; IRON OFF must null against v0.4.37. OPEN: freeze iron voice after audition; painted-metal chassis; deferred patina; LIMITER rename.
